notes: Renamed presets: quick->executive (Executive Summary), full->full (Full Audit), custom->gap (Gap Report). Updated configs: EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY_CONFIG enables canvasSnapshot+gapAnalysis+executiveSummary. FULL_AUDIT_CONFIG enables all sections. GAP_REPORT_CONFIG enables canvasSnapshot+gapAnalysis+perspectiveComparison+improvements. Preset type extended to 'executive'|'full'|'gap'|'custom' (custom kept as internal state for handleToggle auto-deselect). Added aria-describedby={undefined} to DialogContent to suppress Radix BUG-039 warning; DialogDescription already present in header.
